title: Trump says ‘very interesting’ UFO files coming soon
description: In February, Trump directed federal agencies to release their UFO records.

title: Trump offers hints of what’s coming in a new batch of UFO files
description: WASHINGTON — President Donald Trump says the Pentagon is preparing to release some “very interesting” UFO files uncovered by his administration, generating a mix of buzz and skepticism as he hints at new revelations around questions of alien life.

title: Area 51 hit with 17 earthquakes in a single day as Trump promises fresh UFO files release: ‘Worth discussing’
description: Geophysicist Stefan Burns claimed the activity was in "an unusual place to get an earthquake."

title: Trump keeps us up in the air with his hints of what’s coming in a new batch of UFO files
Trump says Pentagon will release new, ‘very interesting’ UFO files ‘very soon’
description: President Donald Trump is promising to release new UFO records that he says will be “very interesting.”
